overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Odyssey showing a character exploring the Patrai Military Shipyard. The character walks through a sunny ancient Greek dockyard with wooden ships under construction, passing a golden statue of Hermes and workers hammering on vessel hulls.

scene_state.functional_zone: shipyard entrance street with wooden buildings

events.description: character approaches the central golden statue, moving from dirt path to wooden planks
character begins circling around the statue base

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the shipyard approach toward the central golden statue, observing the surroundings

notable_agents.action: worker in simple robes walking along the wooden structure

entered.detail: two-story weathered wooden structures with balconies and scaffolding
wooden houses with red cloth awnings and stone foundations
tall golden statue of a robed figure holding a staff on a stone pedestal
rocky mountains visible in the distance beyond the shipyard

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the entrance of an ancient shipyard, approaching a prominent golden statue of Hermes. Wooden buildings line both sides of the dusty path, with mountains visible in the background. The sun casts harsh shadows across the scene as the character moves toward the statue.

scene_state.functional_zone: active shipyard construction area with wooden vessels

events.description: character turns away from the statue and walks toward the docked ships
moving from the statue plaza into the active ship construction zone

agents.ego_description: turning away from the statue and walking deeper into the shipyard toward vessels under construction

notable_agents.action: shirtless worker hammering on the wooden hull of a ship

entered.detail: wooden vessel hull supported by timber scaffolding and logs
tall ship mast with large red and beige canvas sails

segments.scene_description: The character circles the statue and heads toward the active construction area. Large wooden ships in various stages of completion dominate the scene, with a prominent red-sailed vessel visible ahead. Workers are scattered throughout, hammering and carrying materials across the wooden plank walkways.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow shipyard path between vessels under construction

events.description: character walks under large red canvas awning temporarily blocking direct sunlight
approaching the main military shipyard building entrance

agents.ego_description: walking along wooden planks between large ship hulls and construction materials

notable_agents.action: group of workers in red robes conversing near the path ahead

entered.detail: rough timber scaffolding surrounding ship construction sites
large red fabric banners strung between masts providing partial shade

segments.scene_description: The character navigates through a narrow path between massive ship hulls, passing under red canvas awnings that provide partial shade. Workers are busy with construction tasks, and wooden scaffolding surrounds the vessels. The path is cluttered with barrels, ropes, and timber.

scene_state.functional_zone: military shipyard entrance with decorated banners

events.description: location text 'Patrai Military Shipyard' appears at top of screen
character slows and looks up at the decorated building entrance

agents.ego_description: approaching the main shipyard building entrance with blue decorative banners and carved pillars

notable_agents.action: worker in green tunic walking toward the building entrance

entered.detail: main shipyard structure with wooden scaffolding, stone foundation, and open entrance
tall blue fabric banners with white owl symbols and decorative spiral patterns
intricately carved wooden posts with owl totems and blue hanging fabrics

segments.scene_description: The character arrives at the Patrai Military Shipyard entrance, marked by distinctive blue banners with owl symbols and elaborately carved wooden pillars. The main building features heavy timber construction with scaffolding. Workers move about the entrance as the character approaches the structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dusty ancient shipyard that transitions from an open ceremonial entrance into the dense, industrial heart of a military vessel construction site. It begins with the character walking along a sun-drenched path lined with wooden buildings toward a prominent golden statue of Hermes, with distant mountains framing the horizon. As the character circles the statue, the scene opens into an active construction zone dominated by massive wooden ships and a prominent red-sailed vessel, where workers hammer away on plank walkways. The camera then navigates a narrow, cluttered corridor between towering ship hulls and red canvas awnings, passing through a maze of scaffolding, barrels, and timber. Finally, the path leads toward the main entrance of the Patrai Military Shipyard, marked by elaborately carved pillars and blue banners featuring owl symbols.
